---
title: "04. 唯一稀疏分解与规范形"
subtitle: "Unique Sparse Decomposition and Canonical Form"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 4
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `zeckendorf_uniqueness` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `zeckendorf_uniqueness`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_04_zeckendorf_uniqueness.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
